alkylation reagent: alkylation with 50 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature (RT)
alkylation concentration: alkylation with 50 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature (RT)
instrument: mass spectrometer was operated in data-dependent mode, with the Orbitrap operating at 70,000 FWHM
ionization type: using the 0.1% formic acid in water as mobile phase A and 0.1% formic acid in acetonitrile as mobile phase B
labeling: CpaA does inhibit clotting in human plasma in the aPTT assay
